sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value Float64, description String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 10.0, 'normal'), (2, randNormal(10, 2), 'random'), (3, 20.0, NULL);
SELECT id, value, randNormal(value, 4) - randNormal(5, 1) AS diff FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, randNormal(randNormal(10, 2), 1) AS normal_value FROM test_table WHERE description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*), AVG(value) - 10 AS avg_diff FROM test_table WHERE value > (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table) GROUP BY id HAVING avg_diff > 0;
WITH (SELECT randNormal(15, 3) AS random_value) AS subquery SELECT id, value - random_value FROM test_table JOIN subquery ON subquery.random_value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_normals AS SELECT randNormal(20, 5) AS normal_values FROM numbers(100) WHERE normal_values IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value, (SELECT MAX(value - randNormal(5, 0)) FROM test_table) AS max_diff FROM test_table ORDER BY max_diff DESC;
SELECT id, COALESCE(value - NULL, 0) AS adjusted_value FROM test_table WHERE adjusted_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, randNormal(0, 1) - randNormal(5, 5) AS result FROM test_table ORDER BY result ASC;
